title: Advances in Computer Games 12
text: Home * Conferences * Advances in Computer Games 12 < Prev Next > Palacio del Condestable [1] The 12th Advances in Computer Games was held from May 11-13, 2009 , at Palacio del Condestable, Pamplona , Navarre , Spain , in conjunction with the 17th World Computer Chess Championship and the 14th Computer Olympiad . ACG is the conference of the ICGA . Contents 1 Conference Proceedings 2 Lectures 3 See also 4 Reports 5 External Links 6 References Conference Proceedings [ edit ] Advances in Computer Games 12 Jaap van den Herik , Pieter Spronck (eds.)
